sentences.target: C'est notre petit rite du dimanche.

translations.fr: C'est notre petit rite du dimanche.
translations.es: Es nuestro pequeño ritual de los domingos.
translations.it: È il nostro piccolo rituale della domenica.
translations.zh-Hans: 这是我们的小小的周日仪式。
translations.yue: 呢個係我哋嘅星期日小儀式。
translations.pt: É o nosso pequeno ritual de domingo.
translations.he: זה הטקס הקטן של יום ראשון שלנו.
translations.vi: Đây là nghi thức nho nhỏ vào Chủ nhật của chúng tôi.
translations.nl: Dit is ons kleine zondagse ritueel.
translations.hu: Ez a mi kis vasárnapi rituálénk.
translations.hi: यह हमारी छोटी-सी रविवार की रस्म है.
translations.el: Αυτό είναι το μικρό κυριακάτικο τελετουργικό μας.
translations.id: Ini adalah ritual kecil kami pada hari Minggu.
translations.ro: Este micul nostru ritual de duminică.
translations.cs: To je náš malý nedělní rituál.
translations.ja: それは私たちの小さな日曜日の儀式です。

tokens.explanation: Clitic demonstrative pronoun used as subject before a vowel; here stands for an impersonal 'it/that' in a copular construction.
Copular auxiliary verb, 3rd person singular present, linking the subject pronoun to the predicate nominal.
Possessive determiner (1st person plural), modifying the following noun.
Attributive adjective, masculine singular, agreeing with 'rite'.
Common noun, head of the noun phrase serving as predicate complement.
Contraction of the preposition 'de' and the article 'le', introducing a nominal complement.
Common noun denoting a day; complements 'rite' to specify time ('Sunday').

sentences.target: On observe un rite avant chaque match.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ ɔbzɛʁv œ̃ ʁit avɑ̃ ʃak matʃ/

translations.fr: On observe un rite avant chaque match.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ ɔbzɛʁv œ̃ ʁit avɑ̃ ʃak matʃ/
translations.en: We observe a ritual before every game.
translations.es: Seguimos un ritual antes de cada partido.
translations.de: Wir befolgen vor jedem Spiel ein Ritual.
translations.it: Seguiamo un rituale prima di ogni partita.
translations.ko: 우리는 매 경기 전에 의식을 지켜요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在每场比赛前都会进行一个仪式。
translations.yue: 我哋每場比賽前都會做一個儀式。
translations.ru: Перед каждым матчем мы соблюдаем ритуал.
translations.pt: Cumprimos um ritual antes de cada jogo.
translations.he: אנחנו מקיימים טקס לפני כל משחק.
translations.tr: Her maçtan önce bir ritüel yaparız.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi thực hiện một nghi thức trước mỗi trận đấu.
translations.nl: Voor elke wedstrijd volgen we een ritueel.
translations.uk: Перед кожним матчем ми дотримуємося ритуалу.
translations.hu: Minden meccs előtt tartunk egy rituálét.
translations.hi: हम हर मैच से पहले एक रस्म निभाते हैं.
translations.el: Πριν από κάθε αγώνα τηρούμε ένα τελετουργικό.
translations.nb: Før hver kamp følger vi et rituale.
translations.id: Kami menjalankan sebuah ritual sebelum setiap pertandingan.
translations.sv: Inför varje match följer vi en ritual.
translations.ro: Înainte de fiecare meci, urmăm un ritual.
translations.da: Før hver kamp følger vi et rituale.
translations.ja: 私たちは毎試合の前に儀式を行います。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/personal subject pronoun, commonly used with the value 'we' in contemporary usage.
Main verb, 3rd person singular present indicative, agreeing with 'On'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, introducing the noun 'rite'.
Common noun, direct object of the verb 'observe'.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement.
Distributive determiner modifying 'match'.
Common noun, object of the preposition 'avant' (temporal complement).

sentences.target: Le café du matin est un rite.
sentences.reading: /lə kafe dy matɛ̃ ɛ tœ̃ ʁit/

translations.fr: Le café du matin est un rite.
translations.ipa: /lə kafe dy matɛ̃ ɛ tœ̃ ʁit/
translations.es: El café de la mañana es un ritual.
translations.it: Il caffè del mattino è un rituale.
translations.zh-Hans: 早晨的咖啡是一种仪式。
translations.yue: 朝早嘅咖啡係一種儀式。
translations.pt: Tomar café de manhã é um ritual.
translations.vi: Cà phê buổi sáng là một nghi thức.
translations.hi: सुबह की कॉफी एक रस्म है.
translations.ro: Cafeaua de dimineață este un ritual.
translations.ja: 朝のコーヒーは儀式です。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular, determining 'café'.
Common noun, head of the subject noun phrase.
Contraction of 'de' + 'le', introducing a noun complement ('of the morning').
Common noun complement specifying time for 'café'.
Copular auxiliary verb, 3rd person singular present, linking subject to predicate nominal.
Indefinite article, masculine singular.
Common noun serving as the predicate nominal.

sentences.target: Nous respectons le rite familial à Noël.
sentences.reading: /nu ʁɛspɛktɔ̃ lə ʁit familjal a nɔɛl/

translations.fr: Nous respectons le rite familial à Noël.
translations.ipa: /nu ʁɛspɛktɔ̃ lə ʁit familjal a nɔɛl/
translations.en: We follow the family ritual at Christmas.
translations.es: Seguimos el ritual familiar en Navidad.
translations.de: An Weihnachten halten wir das Familienritual ein.
translations.it: Seguiamo il rituale di famiglia a Natale.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在圣诞节遵循家庭的仪式。
translations.yue: 我哋喺聖誕節會遵守家庭儀式。
translations.ru: На Рождество мы соблюдаем семейный ритуал.
translations.pt: Seguimos o ritual da família no Natal.
translations.he: בחג המולד אנחנו מקיימים את הטקס המשפחתי.
translations.vi: Vào dịp Giáng Sinh, chúng tôi làm theo nghi thức của gia đình.
translations.ar: في عيد الميلاد نتبع الطقس العائلي.
translations.nl: Met Kerst volgen we het familieritueel.
translations.uk: На Різдво ми дотримуємося сімейного ритуалу.
translations.hi: क्रिसमस पर हम पारिवारिक रस्म का पालन करते हैं.
translations.pl: W Boże Narodzenie odprawiamy rodzinny rytuał.
translations.el: Τα Χριστούγεννα ακολουθούμε το οικογενειακό τελετουργικό.
translations.nb: I julen følger vi familiens rituale.
translations.id: Saat Natal kami mengikuti ritual keluarga.
translations.sv: Till jul följer vi familjens ritual.
translations.da: Til jul følger vi familiens rituale.
translations.ja: クリスマスには家族の儀式を守ります。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person plural.
Main verb, 1st person plural present indicative, agreeing with 'Nous'.
Definite article, masculine singular, determining 'rite'.
Common noun, direct object of 'respectons'.
Attributive adjective, masculine singular, modifying 'rite'.
Preposition introducing a temporal/locative complement.
Proper noun, object of the preposition 'à', denoting the holiday.
